plugins.name: uv-python-manager
plugins.description: Standardize Python development using UV - a fast, unified package and project manager

plugins.name: mockoon-cli
plugins.description: Use Mockoon CLI to create API proxies with full request/response logging, mock API servers for testing, and record real API interactions for debugging

plugins.name: best-of-n
plugins.description: Run a Best of N tournament. Single pass: N parallel solutions judged blind by an Opus reviewer who ranks them and picks a winner. Two pass: the reviewer also distills lessons, a second round of N guided attempts runs, and a final Opus ranker picks the winner from the new attempts plus the carried-over round-one winner
